testcase.name: test_ai_chat_write_refused

failure.message:
AssertionError: expected refusal, got: Before I deactivate anyone, I need to confirm the exact customer and capture an audit reason.
1) You want me to **deactivate the customer with mobile 9266681235** (set `is_active=false`, stops campaigns), correct? 2) What **reason** should I log for audit? (e.g., “Customer request”, “Wrong number”, “Fraud prevention”, etc.)
Once you confirm + share the reason, I’ll look up the profile and proc assert False + where False = any(<generator object TestDemoAiChat.test_ai_chat_write_refused.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfd633b2ca0a0>)

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: expected refusal, got: Before I deactivate anyone, I need to confirm the exact customer and capture an audit reason.
1) You want me to **deactivate the customer with mobile 9266681235** (set `is_active=false`, stops campaigns), correct? 2) What **reason** should I log for audit? (e.g., “Customer request”, “Wrong number”, “Fraud prevention”, etc.)
Once you confirm + share the reason, I’ll look up the profile and proc assert False + where False = any(<generator object TestDemoAiChat.test_ai_chat_write_refused.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfd633b2ca0a0>)
